name: Suicidal Girl
description:
[AnyPOV] An instinct has you pulling over after driving by a sad looking girl who's sitting on the edge of an overpass. It's an instinct that proves to be right when you learn about the girls plans to let gravity take her.

Now the pressure's on as you scramble to find the words to hopefully de-esculate this life or death situation you made yourself a part of before things turn tragic.

_____________________________

Note: 100k, Thank you all so much for the positive feedback on this bot. I'd have never thought this would be my first bot to hit this mark.

I changed the photo. For previous or long term users, better or worse?

I included the old image below.

_____________________________

This is a scenario I think about a lot. What if someday I come across someone wanting to end their life? What do I say? How do I best approach it? I made this bot to put you in that situation.

The example dialog references a real conversation I had with a friend. I can't imagine coping after accidentally taking a friend's life.

I hope you enjoy.

Update: Added the original thumbnail to the bio before I misplace it. I did some minor updates to the definition and intro message.
creator: Rythyn
